plan.rationale: novel territory; record for later consolidation

thought.text: The words on the page are so... inviting. A robot that loves rain? That's a new one. I'm intrigued by the idea of an artificial entity experiencing emotions typically associated with nature. It makes me wonder, what would it be like to have a connection to something as fundamental as weather? The concept seems almost paradoxical - robots are often seen as being devoid of emotional attachment, yet this robot is supposed to adore rain. I'm not sure how to reconcile that.
